description: Hyprland `focusedmon`/`focusedmonv2` event: monitor name + workspace name (not IDs).

monitor_name.description: Monitor name as provided by Hyprland (e.g. "DP-1"), not an integer ID.

workspace_name.description: Workspace name as provided by Hyprland.

title: HyprlandMonitorFocusedPayload
